# Integration Technical Note: material selection for structural panels

**Attendees:** Tobias Wren, Dev Patel, Rowan Ellery, Priya Nair

## Summary

This page covers the material selection for structural panels for the Integration subsystem. Key items discussed and actions agreed are recorded here.

## Actions

- Follow-up with Felix Herrera on outstanding items.
